dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers from 17 countries, including the UK, Tuesday urged Israel and Lebanon to "seize this opportunity" in a statement ahead of US-mediated talks between the two nations in Washington.

The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: Alfred Hitchcock on prioritising what matters — ‘Drama is life with the dull bits cut out’
dailyNews.description: Legendary filmmaker Alfred Hitchcock’s iconic line is more than a cinematic insight—it is a sharp reminder to edit life with purpose. In an age of constant distraction, his words push us to focus on meaning, cut through noise, and prioritise what truly adds value.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Stefanik addresses Swalwell allegations, says members of Congress need to "look in the mirror"
dailyNews.description: Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik of New York speaks to "CBS Mornings" about the resignations of Democratic Rep. Eric Swalwell and Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales after both lawmakers were publicly accused of sexual misconduct. Stefanik also addresses President Trump's recent clash with Pope Leo over the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump doubles down on feud with Pope Leo amid backlash over post depicting him as Jesus
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke with CBS News' Norah O'Donnell on Monday night about his ongoing feud with Pope Leo XIV, saying the pontiff is "wrong on the issues." Meanwhile, Mr. Trump defended his now-deleted social media post of an AI image depicting him as Jesus Christ, telling reporters he thought it made him look like a doctor. CBS News' Chris Livesay and Olivia Rinaldi have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets US ambassador to China as tensions flare ahead of Xi showdown
dailyNews.description: Trump is set to meet with U.S. Ambassador to China David Perdue as the administration prepares for a summit with Xi Jinping in May.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin-Mamdani clash over Stonewall monument reaches final decision
dailyNews.description: A judge accepted a settlement restoring the Pride flag at Stonewall National Monument permanently after a two-month legal battle over its removal.

dailyNews.title: Trump squeezed between Israel and Turkey as Netanyahu, Erdogan escalate feud
dailyNews.description: Israel–Turkey tensions escalate sharply as Netanyahu and Erdogan clash over Gaza, Iran and regional influence, creating a diplomatic challenge for Trump.

dailyNews.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: More U.S.-Iran peace deal talks are in discussion, White House says
dailyNews.description: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at a trickle, despite President Donald Trump proclaiming that a ceasefire with Iran depended on it reopening.

dailyNews.title: Trump says gas prices 'could be the same' or 'a little bit higher' by the midterms
dailyNews.description: The U.S. began blocking ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, sending oil prices surging after peace talks failed over the weekend.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
